description_long: This is a pair of high-top athletic sneakers, predominantly white with black overlays and a distinctive iridescent panel wrapping around the heel and ankle area. The shoes feature a classic basketball silhouette with perforated toe boxes for breathability and a padded collar for ankle support. The side panels display a black Nike Swoosh, while the lateral ankle area includes a black Air Jordan Wings logo. The tongue is white with a multicolored Jumpman logo patch, and the shoes are laced with white standard criss-cross laces. The midsole is white, and the outsole appears to be black, providing contrast and durability. The shoes are displayed on a black shoebox with gold branding and a visible size label.
description: A pair of high-top, white and black athletic sneakers with iridescent heel panels, Nike Swoosh, and Air Jordan branding, displayed on a black shoebox.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white perforated toe boxes, white laces, and multicolored Jumpman logo on the tongues.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the black Nike Swoosh, iridescent heel panel, and Air Jordan Wings logo.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the iridescent heel panels and padded collars, with both shoes aligned on the box.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the black Swoosh, iridescent heel, and Air Jordan Wings logo from the opposite side.
attribute_logo: Black Air Jordan Wings logo on the ankle, multicolored Jumpman logo on the tongue, black Nike Swoosh on the side panels.
